title: Guardrail Flows (guardrails.co)

book.title: NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails Library Developer Guide

content:
Guardrail Flows ( guardrails.co ) Flows to guardrail user inputs and LLM responses. # Check user utterances before they get further processed
flow run input rails $input_text
Check llm responses before they get further processed
flow run output rails $output_text
summary: Guardrail Flows ( guardrails.co ) Flows to guardrail user inputs and LLM responses. # Check user utterances before they get further processed flow run input rails $input_text # Check llm responses before they get further processed flow run output rails $output_text
